name: content-model
description: Review or scaffold an SEO/AEO content model on any stack — scores an existing content model (markdown/MDX front-matter, a code-defined content type, or a connected headless/traditional CMS) against a recommended five-group field schema with weighted scoring, or proposes a complete model (front-matter template + JSON-LD, a TS type, or CMS fields). Local files are the backbone; a CMS MCP is optional.
